name: Canuc Resources Corporation
summary: Canuc Resources Corporation engages in exploration, evaluation, and development of precious and base metal projects and oil and gas properties in Canada, the United States, and Mexico. The company holds interests in the San Javier Project that consists of 17 mineral concessions comprising silver, lead, gold, copper, and zinc deposits located in the state of Sonora, Mexico. Its oil and gas properties include 100% working interestS in Coody Morales Lease; 20% working interests in Thompson lease consisting of 5 producing gas wells; and various oil and gas prospect leases situated in Stephens and Shackelford Counties, Texas, as well as Saskatchewan Project located in Canada. The company was formerly known as Santa Rosa Silver Mining Corp. and changed its name to Canuc Resources Corporation in February 2017. Canuc Resources Corporation is based in Toronto, Canada.
